records.ety: [NL. euphrasia, fr. Gr. e'yfrasi`a delight, fr. e'yfrai`nein to delight; e'y^ well + frh`n heart, mind: cf. LL. eufrasia, F. eufraise.]

defs: The plant eyebright (Euphrasia officionalis), formerly regarded as beneficial in disorders of the eyes.
quotes: Then purged with euphrasy and rue The visual nerve, for he had much to see.
